base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_character_intro_jp_alt — a ui from 1980 pac man. Japanese alt-names variant — URCHIN/MACKY, ROMP/MICKY, STYLIST/MUCKY, CRYBABY/MOCKY. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Japanese alt-names variant — URCHIN/MACKY, ROMP/MICKY, STYLIST/MUCKY, CRYBABY/MOCKY; same layout structure as jp_normal
